channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: US-backed commander says his Kurdish-led group wants a secular and civil state in post-Assad Syria
item.description: HASSAKEH, Syria (AP) — The commander of the main U.S.-backed force in Syria said Sunday the recent ouster of the Assad family from power should be followed by building a secular, civil and decentralized state that treats all its citizens equally no matter their religion or ethnicity.
item.dc:creator: BASSEM MROUE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Airport employee injured in collision with aircraft wing at Chicago's O'Hare
item.description: The driver of a tug vehicle at Chicago O'Hare International Airport was injured Saturday evening after colliding with the wing of an airplane.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, Fox 5

item.title: China to file lawsuit with WTO, vows 'countermeasures' in response to Trump tariffs
item.description: In a statement, the ministry’s spokesperson vowed further “countermeasures” against the United States but did not specify what steps it would take.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Grammy Awards: How to watch the ceremony, red carpet arrivals, interviews
item.description: The 67th annual Grammy Awards are set to recognize some of the most talented performers and biggest hits in pop music on Sunday, with different ways to watch the festivities.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump puts tariffs on Canada, Mexico and China, spurring trade war as North American allies respond
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Saturday signed an order to impose stiff tariffs on imports from Mexico, Canada and China, drawing swift retaliation and an undeniable sense of betrayal from the country's North American neighbors as a trade war erupted among the longtime allies.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, ZEKE MILLER, ROB GILLIES and CHRISTOPHER SHERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Data from the deadliest U.S. air accident in a generation show conflicting altitude readings
item.description: Recovery crews and divers searched the Potomac River for remains and cleared wreckage Saturday from the midair collision of a passenger jet and Army helicopter that killed 67 people.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hershey isn't sure why Kisses are called 'Kisses'
item.description: Why isn't it called a Hershey’s Smooch or a Hershey’s Cone? Even the people at Hershey aren’t exactly sure.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: ICE crackdown sees 7,400 illegal migrants arrested in 9 days
item.description: Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) has arrested more than 7,400 people in nine days across several states amid its aggressive crackdown on illegal immigration since the new Trump administration came into office.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Trump's meme coin is a cash grab
item.description: The coin – officially called $Trump – briefly ascended into the top 15 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization and attracted over a half-million buyers.
item.dc:creator: Maximilian Brichta Doctoral Student of Communication, University of Southern California, KTLA 5

item.title: VIDEO: 525-pound bear found hiding under evacuated home after Southern California fire
item.description: Wildlife officials rescued a 525-pound bear found hiding underneath a home that was evacuated during the Eaton Fire.
item.dc:creator: Vivian Chow, WFLA, NBC

item.title: DC plane crash: ATC staffing levels under scrutiny as barges arrive to help salvage ops
item.description: Barges are expected to arrive in the D.C area on Saturday to help with salvage operations from Wednesday's deadly plane crash at Regan National Airport as investigator's probe the cause of a collision that left 67 people dead.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Palisades, Eaton fires in Southern California 100% contained, officials say
item.description: The Palisades Fire and Eaton Fire that burned thousands of acres in the Los Angeles area have been 100% contained, fire officials said on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A medical plane carrying a child patient and 5 others crashes in Philadelphia, setting homes ablaze
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — A medical transport jet with a child patient, her mother and four others aboard crashed into a Philadelphia neighborhood shortly after takeoff Friday evening, exploding in a fireball that engulfed several homes.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and MATT ROURKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Man agrees to plead guilty for flying drone that damaged firefighting aircraft in LA wildfire
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The pilot of a drone that crashed into a firefighting plane, leaving a gaping hole and grounding the aircraft during the deadly Palisades Fire in Los Angeles, has agreed to plead guilty to a misdemeanor count of unsafely operating a drone, federal authorities said Friday.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING and OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Medical plane carrying pediatric patient crashes in Philadelphia, sets homes ablaze
item.description: A medical transport jet headed for Missouri and carrying two people and four crew members crashed in Northeast Philadelphia Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NTSB determined to get crash probe right: Ex-FAA chief
item.description: An ex-FAA official does not expect the National Transportation Safety Board to rush to judgment in fatal midair crash.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Robert Santos decides to resign as US Census Bureau director midway through a 5-year term
item.description: Robert Santos, who emphasized inclusivity and outreach to overlooked communities, has decided to resign as director of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SCHNEIDER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 40+ bodies pulled from Potomac near Reagan National
item.description: More than 40 bodies have been recovered from the Potomac River after a deadly mid-air collision sent an Army Black Hawk helicopter and American Airlines plane diving into the icy water earlier this week, according to The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: 40+ bodies pulled from Potomac near Reagan National
item.description: More than 40 bodies have been recovered from the Potomac River after a deadly mid-air collision sent an Army Black Hawk helicopter and American Airlines plane diving into the icy water earlier this week, according to The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Wichita airport sets up memorial for DC plane crash victims
item.description: Wichita Dwight D. Eisenhower Airport set up a memorial for the 64 victims lost on an American Airlines flight.
item.dc:creator: Zena Taher, NewsNation

item.title: 2 arrested in Texas after kidnapping ‘TikTok prank’ near school
item.description: “The children immediately contacted their parents, who notified the Kyle Police Department,” KPD said.
item.dc:creator: Julianna Russ, NewsNation

item.title: Flight recorders recovered in DCA crash
item.description: The National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) said Thursday that they recovered flight data recorders, known as black boxes, from the aircraft involved in the deadly mid-air collision near Reagan Washington National Airport earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, WGN 9

item.title: Trump says helicopter in crash was flying too high
item.description: President Donald Trump on Friday asserted the military helicopter involved in a deadly midair collision near Washington, D.C., was "flying too high.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WGN 9

item.title: DC plane crash: Recovery continues, NTSB says investigation ongoing
item.description: Air crash investigations can take months, and federal investigators told reporters they would not speculate on the cause.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Midair collision kills 67 people in the deadliest US air disaster in almost a quarter century
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — A midair collision between an Army helicopter and a jetliner killed all 67 people aboard the two aircraft, officials said Thursday, as they scrutinized the actions of the military pilot in the country's deadliest aviation disaster in almost a quarter century.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, TARA COPP, ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and LEA SKENE, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dick Button, Olympic great and voice of skating, dies at 95
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Dick Button was more than the most accomplished men’s figure skater in history. He was one of his sport’s great innovators and promoters, the man responsible not only for inventing the flying camel spin but describing it to generations of fans.
item.dc:creator: BARRY WILNER and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Top music acts announced for FireAid, a concert to support L.A. wildfire victims
item.description: The biggest names in pop, rock and country are coming together to raise funds for victims of the Palisades and Eaton wildfires and assist with the recovery.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, NewsNation

item.title: Marianne Faithfull, singer, actress and Rolling Stones muse, dies at 78
item.description: The 1960s icon passed in London surrounded by family, according to a statement from her record promotion group.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Olympian Nancy Kerrigan mourns loss of skating community members after DC plane crash
item.description: “Much like everyone here has been saying is not sure how to process it,” she told MSNBC while in tears on Thursday at the Boston Skating Club.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KRON4

item.title: Big Oil wants a lot from Trump. It has an ally in Doug Burgum, the president's Interior pick
item.description: BISMARCK, N.D. (AP) — When North Dakota's petroleum association was going to hold a banquet honoring top fracking executives last year, it turned to Gov. Doug Burgum.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN SLODYSKO and JACK DURA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Reagan National Airport one of world's most complex airspaces
item.description: Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport (DCA) services both military helicopters and passenger planes every day.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, Fox 5

item.title: Former Pennsylvania native, family killed in DC plane crash with army helicopter
item.description: JOHNSTOWN, Pa. (WTAJ) — A former Central Pennsylvania native along with her husband and two kids are among those who died in a plane crash Wednesday night when it collided with an army helicopter near Washington D.C.
item.dc:creator: Rian Bossler, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump holds briefing on plane crash near DC, suggests DEI programs contributed
item.description: President Donald Trump held a briefing Thursday morning on the deadly collision between an American Airlines plane and a military helicopter over the Potomac River.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: White House budget office rescinds federal funding freeze memo
item.description: The Trump administration’s Office of Management and Budget released a new memo Wednesday rescinding a controversial memo issued late Monday that froze a wide swath of federal financial assistance, which had paralyzed many federal programs and caused a huge uproar on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, ABC 4
